_publications._publicationTitle: Transplanting neurofibromatosis-1 gene knockout neural stem cells improve functional recovery in rats with spinal cord injury by enhancing the mTORC2 pathway.

_contextSnippet: Specifically, after the knockout of NF-1, the expression of phosphorylated mTOR (P-mTOR), Rictor, MAP2, and β3-Tubulin was upregulated
details: After NF-1 knockout, expression of P-mTOR, Rictor, MAP2, and β3-Tubulin was upregulated in NSCs
